name: Interview Authenticity Checker
description: Detect AI-generated and plagiarised interview responses using style comparison and plagiarism scanning.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; default-src 'self'
